arts.ttl: No regrets: Man Utd hierarchy stand by Rashford decision, three transfer targets eyed to replace him
arts.sum: Manchester United’s hierarchy reportedly have no regrets about letting Marcus Rashford leave and go out on loan to Aston Villa in January. The England international has shown glimpses of his best form again in a Villa shirt, but all in all it perhaps makes sense that the club are still planning for life without him […] The post No regrets: Man Utd hierarchy stand by Rashford decision, three transfer targets eyed to replace him appeared first on CaughtOffside.
